source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my younger brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: daa2 si1 ik1
cards.english: [Hiccups]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: Peppa、George 豬太太同豬先生喺度食緊早餐
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai2 dou6 sik6 gan2 zou2 caan1
cards.english: Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, and Daddy Pig are eating breakfast.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 ge3 tin1 hei3 fei1 soeng4 hou2 aa3
cards.english: The weather is very nice today.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 sam1 gap1 soeng2 ceot1 heoi3 waan2 aa3
cards.english: Peppa and George are eager to go out and play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 媽咪，我哋可以出去玩嗎？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 ceot1 heoi3 waan2 maa1
cards.english: Mommy, can we go out and play?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 你哋要食晒早餐先可以出去玩㗎
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 jiu3 sik6 saai3 zou2 caan1 sin1 ho2 ji5 ceot1 heoi3 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: You have to finish your breakfast before you can go out to play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: George，飲果汁唔好飲得咁快啊
cards.jyutping: jam2 gwo2 zap1 m4 hou2 jam2 dak1 gam3 faai3 aa3
cards.english: George, don't drink your juice so fast.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 jam2 gwo2 zap1 jam2 dak1 taai3 faai3
cards.english: Since George drank his juice too fast

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ling6 keoi5 ji4 gaa1 daa2 si1 ik1 aa3
cards.english: It's making him hiccup now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 我哋而家可以出去玩嗎？媽咪
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ji4 gaa1 ho2 ji5 ceot1 heoi3 waan2 maa1 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Can we go out to play now, Mommy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: dang2 m4 zoi3 daa2 si1 ik1 sin1 laa1
cards.english: Let's wait until George stops hiccupping.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ji4 gaa1 mou5 daa2 si1 ik1 laa3
cards.english: But George isn't hiccupping anymore now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: hai6 mai6 aa3
cards.english: Is that right, George?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 好啦，你哋可以出去玩喇
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 nei5 dei6 ho2 ji5 ceot1 heoi3 waan2 laa3
cards.english: Okay, you can go out to play now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 tai2 zyu6 sai3 lou2 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: You have to look after your little brother.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: tung4
cards.english: Peppa and George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: Really like to play in the garden

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 paau1 go3 bo1 bei2 nei5
cards.english: George, I'm going to throw you the ball now

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 zip3 zyu6 keoi5 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: You have to catch it

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 zoi3 daa2 si1 ik1 laa3
cards.english: George, don't keep having hiccups

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: nei5 ji4 gaa1 paau1 faan1 go3 bo1 bei2 ngo5
cards.english: Now you throw the ball back to me

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 zip3 zyu6 keoi5 aa1
cards.english: Let me catch it

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: aa3
cards.english: George!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 弊喇，George打思噎搞到佢玩唔到喎
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 daa2 si1 ik1 gaau2 dou3 keoi5 waan2 m4 dou3 wo3
cards.english: Oh no, George's hiccups are stopping him from playing

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: George，我有方法幫你冇打思噎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jau5 fong1 faat3 bong1 nei5 mou5 daa2 si1 ik1
cards.english: George, I have a way to help you get rid of your hiccups.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jiu3 ziu3 ngo5 gong2 ge3 heoi3 zou6 aa3
cards.english: You have to do as I say.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 一邊摸住你頭頂一邊摸下個肚
cards.jyutping: jat1 bin1 mo2 zyu6 nei5 tau4 deng2 jat1 bin1 mo2 haa6 go3 tou5
cards.english: Touch the top of your head while touching your belly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 做得好，而家你唔會打思噎㗎喇
cards.jyutping: zou6 dak1 hou2 ji4 gaa1 nei5 m4 wui6 daa2 si1 ik1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Good job, you won't have hiccups now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ge3 fong1 faat3 tai2 lai4 mou5 haau6 wo3
cards.english: Looks like Peppa's method isn't working.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jyun4 cyun4 zou6 co3 saai3 aa3
cards.english: George, you're doing it completely wrong!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 我知道有另外一個醫打思噎嘅方法
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 dou3 jau5 ling6 ngoi6 jat1 go3 ji1 daa2 si1 ik1 ge3 fong1 faat3
cards.english: I know another way to cure hiccups.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 首先呢，你要原地跳三次，要用單腳跳
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 ne1 nei5 jiu3 jyun4 dei6 tiu3 saam1 ci3 jiu3 jung6 daan1 goek3 tiu3
cards.english: First, you have to jump three times on the spot, on one leg.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 zau6 hai6 gam2 feng6 nei5 deoi3 sau2
cards.english: Now, swing your arms like this.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zoi3 san1 tiu4 lei6 ceot1 lei4
cards.english: And then stick your tongue out.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: gan1 zyu6 ne1 mai5 maai4 deoi3 ngaan5
cards.english: Then, close your eyes

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 然後好快噉原地轉，轉三次
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 hou2 faai3 gam2 jyun4 dei6 zyun3 zyun3 saam1 ci3
cards.english: Then spin around quickly in place three times

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: dai6 ji6 go3 fong1 faat3 jat1 joeng6 mou5 haau6
cards.english: Peppa's second method also didn't work

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: zung6 daa2 gan2 si1 jit3 aa3
cards.english: George is still having hiccups

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 dou3 laa3
cards.english: I've got it!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: jiu3 ji1 daa2 si1 ik1
cards.english: To cure hiccups

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 就一定要嚇嗰個人至得啊
cards.jyutping: zau6 jat1 ding6 jiu3 haak3 go2 go3 jan4 zi3 dak1 aa3
cards.english: You have to scare the person

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 jiu3 haak3 nei5 aa3
cards.english: George, I'm going to scare you now

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 nei5 jiu3 gei3 zyu6
cards.english: But you have to remember

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 我噉做只係為咗醫好你唔再打思噎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gam2 zou6 zi2 hai6 wai6 zo2 ji1 hou2 nei5 m4 zoi3 daa2 si1 ik1
cards.english: I'm only doing this to cure your hiccups

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 記住吖，我只係詐諦嚇你㗎咋
cards.jyutping: gei3 zyu6 aa1 ngo5 zi2 hai6 zaa3 dai3 haak3 nei5 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: Remember, I was only pretending to scare you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 ho2 ji5 gam2 joeng2 haak3 gaa4
cards.english: Peppa, you can't scare George like that.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 ji4 gaa1 zung6 sai3 aa3
cards.english: He's still little.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: I'm sorry.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 我只係想George唔再打思噎咋
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi2 hai6 soeng2 m4 zoi3 daa2 si1 ik1 zaa3
cards.english: I only wanted George to stop hiccuping.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: mou5 zoi3 daa2 si1 ik1 laa3
cards.english: George isn't hiccuping anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 hong6 gan2 gwo3 lai4
cards.english: Mr. Pig is walking over here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: zung6 daai3 maai4 loeng5 bui1 gwo2 zap1 tim1 aa3
cards.english: And he's bringing two cups of juice.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: George，如果你飲得太快又會打思噎㗎喇
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 nei5 jam2 dak1 taai3 faai3 jau6 wui6 daa2 si1 ik1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: George, if you drink too fast, you'll start hiccuping again.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 ci5 gam3 sai3 go3
cards.english: I'm not as small as George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E11 Hiccups［打思噎］
cards.characters: 我鍾意飲幾多幾快都冇問題㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung1 ji3 jam2 gei2 do1 gei2 faai3 dou1 mou5 man6 tai4 gaa4
cards.english: I can drink however much and however fast I want without any problems.
